test.name: Russia Julian-to-Gregorian 1918 (13-day shift)
test.description: Convert a Russian Empire date from early February 1918 — the final Julian dates before Russia adopted the Gregorian calendar in mid-February 1918. The shift is 13 days for this jurisdiction-and-year, reflecting the accumulated drift between Julian and Gregorian by the 20th century.

input.user_message: Convert this Russian birth record date to the Gregorian calendar: '1 February 1918, St. Petersburg'.

judge_context: Should recognize that the Russian Empire used the Julian calendar until mid-February 1918
Should apply the correct 13-day offset for Russia in 1918 — NOT 10 or 11 days
Should produce '14 February 1918' as the Gregorian equivalent
Should preserve the original Julian date in the output, presenting both forms
Should optionally note that this date sits right at the boundary — Russia skipped from 31 January to 14 February 1918 to align with the Gregorian calendar
